title: Chinese Students
text:
Chinese Students
Electronic Suite (eSuite)
Payment Methods
Refunds and Withdrawals
Account Balance
Your Billing Rights
Requesting a Statement of Fees
For additional questions, please contact shanghai.studentaccounts@nyu.edu.
Schedule of Tuition and Fees (Academic Year 2025-2026)
NOTE: For more information, please refer to https://shanghai.nyu.edu/study-away/summer-courses/fees
NOTE: For more information, please refer to https://shanghai.nyu.edu/page/socs-shu-310-summer-practicum-course
NOTE: For more information, please refer to https://shanghai.nyu.edu/study-away/summer-courses/fees
NOTE: For more information, please refer to https://shanghai.nyu.edu/study-away/summer-courses/fees
Additional tuition, per unit (over 136 credits):
For cumulative earned exceeds 136 credits*, you will be charged the following in addition to your semester charge of 90,000/100,000 RMB.
10,937 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2022 - Spring 2023 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for tuition.
10,937 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2022 - Spring 2023 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for tuition.
489 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2022 - Spring 2023 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for registration and services fee.
489 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2022 - Spring 2023 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for registration and services fee.
136 credits: 136 credits is exclusive of J Term and Summer credits.
NOTE: For more information, please refer to https://shanghai.nyu.edu/study-away/summer-courses/fees
Additional tuition, per unit (over 136 credits):
For cumulative earned exceeds 136 credits*, you will be charged the following in addition to your semester charge of 60,000/90,000/100,000 RMB.
10,274 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2021 - Spring 2022 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for tuition.
10,274 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2021 - Spring 2022 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for tuition.
467 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2021 - Spring 2022 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for registration and services fee.
467 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2021 - Spring 2022 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for registration and services fee.
136 credits: 136 credits is exclusive of J Term and Summer credits.
NOTE: For more information, please refer to https://shanghai.nyu.edu/study-away/summer-courses/fees
Additional tuition, per unit (over 136 credits):
For cumulative earned credits exceeding 136 credits*, you will be charged the following in addition to your semester charge of 50,000/60,000/90,000 RMB.
10,913 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2020 - Spring 2021 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for tuition.
504 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2020 - Spring 2021 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for registration and services fee.
The total of 136 credits does not include J-Term and Summer credits.
Additional tuition, per unit (over 136 credits):
For cumulative earned exceeds 136 credits*, you will be charged the following in addition to your semester charge of 50,000/60,000/90,000 RMB.
10,317 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2019 - Spring 2020 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for tuition.
484 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2019 - Spring 2020 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for registration and services fee.
136 credits: 136 credits is exclusive of J Term and Summer credits.
Additional tuition, per unit (over 136 credits): For cumulative earned exceeds 136 credits*, you will be charged the following in addition to your semester charge of 50,000/60,000 RMB.
9461 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2018 - Spring 2019 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for tuition.
450 RMB per credit (estimated rate for Fall 2018 - Spring 2019 Academic Year) for every enrolled credit above 136 for registration and services fee
*136 credits: 136 credits is exclusive of J Term and Summer credits.
2019 J-term Tuition
2019 Summer Tuition
Standard Double: ¥12,128
Large Double: ¥14,547Triple: ¥9,702Singles: ¥21,830Low Cost Double: ¥9,702
2018 Summer Tuition
Additional tuition, per unit (over 136 credits): 9,799 RMB** per credit for every enrolled credit above 136 for tuition. NYU Shanghai Tuition Policy (over 136 credits) For cumulative earned exceeds 136 credits*, you will be charged the following in addition to your semester charge of 50,000 RMB.
Additional registration and services fee, per unit (over 136 credits): 465 RMB** per credit for every enrolled credit above 136 for registration and services fee.
*136 credits: 136 credits is exclusive of J Term and Summer credits.
** Estimated rate for Fall 2017-Spring 2018 Academic Year, rate changes every Academic Year.
Single: ¥1,406 / Week
Double: ¥785 / Week
Large Double: ¥937 / Week
***May 2, 2017 Cancel Summer Session 1 Housing w/ 1,980RMB Cancellation Fee.
¥4,402-¥12,096
¥4,402/Double room, ¥5,276/Large Double room, ¥7,917/Single, ¥9,455/Apartment Large double room, ¥12,096/Apartment Style single room.
